Boss NAME read as a short red-colored name (UNCERTAIN; best guess Lord Ruthven, the ROTF vampire lord — the 'thousand years / vengeance / broken seal' trope fits a vampire awakening, and Ruthven's Castle is a ROTF dungeon). The player who broke the seal appears to be named 'Forgiven'.

mechanics: DOCUMENTED UI/items: a buff TINCTURE/consumable granting '+5 Def +5 Spd' = 'Speedy for 12 sec.' (a timed-buff consumable). An ability named 'Eye for an Eye' (blue eye icon). An ABILITY/SKILL UI panel with a grid of ability icons (relates to the documented Class/Skill-tree system — abilities have icons/slots). A '0/82' + '8/8' wave/clear counter (a clear-N-waves gate, complements the 'Current number of the remaining enemies' gate seen elsewhere).
uncertain: Boss NAME not legibly read (blurry red text) — 'Lord Ruthven' is an educated guess from the awakening trope + ROTF roster, NOT confirmed. Attacks/phases/drops not isolated. Much of the video is sprite/UI showcase, not a full fight.
confidence: HIGH for the verbatim awakening monologue lines + the '+5 Def +5 Spd / Speedy 12s' tincture + the 'Eye for an Eye' ability + the ability-UI panel. LOW/UNCERTAIN for the boss identity (likely Ruthven) and the dungeon name.
